div.head: 150. Editorial Note
div.p: On March 14, the Operations Coordinating Board approved a Progress Report on NSC 5612/1. (Department of State, S/P–NSC Files: Lot 62 D 1, NSC 5612 Series) NSC 5612/1 is printed as Document 119.

At the NSC meeting on May 2, the Council, according to NSC Action No. 1711, “noted and discussed” the Progress Report. (Department of State, S/S–NSC Files (Miscellaneous) Files: Lot 66 D 95) The NSC did not discuss the substance of the Progress Report. (Memorandum of discussion by Gleason, May 2; Eisenhower Library, Whitman File, NSC Records)
